findings.problem: At the hearing's moral apex, civilian harm testimony is compressed into montage summary (three witnesses in one paragraph) rather than rendered at scene level. This is sanitization drift via summary-replacing-scene: consequence is reported, not fully experienced in real time.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand the public-comment block at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:351 into at least one fully dramatized witness exchange (direct quote + concrete object/body detail + immediate room response), then trim adjacent connective exposition around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:353-355 to keep pacing.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:351-355 contains at least one witness testimony presented over 3+ consecutive lines with concrete sensory detail and an explicit panel/crowd reaction; FAIL if the section remains a multi-witness summary sentence cluster.

findings.problem: Two long stretches run as near-transcript without focalizer interiority (Ji-eun cross-exam and indictment procedure), pushing close-third narration toward screenplay mode.
findings.rewrite_direction: Insert Ina's internal experience beats inside the cited spans: one around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:285-303 during debt/sedation testimony, and one around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:391-401 when indictment conditions are read and processed.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if in each cited span there is no run longer than 6 consecutive paragraphs without Ina thought/sensation/self-assessment, and each span includes at least 2 explicit interior beats tied to live testimony/ruling content; otherwise FAIL.

findings.problem: Ji-eun's stress is repeatedly signaled with the same left-hand tremor cue, creating mechanical repetition from a single stress marker and flattening emotional progression.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep one early tremor anchor near snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:157 or :267, then replace later repeats near snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:321 and :475 with different embodied signals (voice break, breath control failure, posture shift, forced smile collapse) consistent with her public/private register toggling.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if references to Ji-eun's left-hand tremor/stillness occur no more than 2 times across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:157-475 and at least 2 distinct alternate stress cues are visible; FAIL if the tremor cue remains the dominant repeated marker.

findings.problem: The recurring gaze-pivot construction ("looked ... then back/then at ...") appears three times, becoming a visible prose tic and reducing line-level freshness.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise at least two of the cited lines so turn-taking is conveyed through non-gaze actions (object handling, interruption, breath, micro-movement) while preserving scene logic.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the exact gaze-pivot template appears at most twice in the full revised chapter and at least two of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:101/:167/:319 are rewritten with different beat mechanics; otherwise FAIL.

summary: The chapter lands core causal beats (Ina testimony, Ji-eun corroboration, council dissolution, indictment) with strong momentum and character-level consequence, but it does not clear craft/prose review due one HIGH sanitization-by-summary block and multiple prose repetition/interiority issues.
